candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Capitalized expenditure on development in COGS
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row tied to COGS. It appears directly beneath 'Cost of goods sold' and alongside 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value', indicating it is a component of the selected COGS total rather than a separate same-level expense to add.
Generic D&A label appears later in the operating section but has no visible values and no clear bucket assignment to the selected COGS rows. It should not be added.
Generic depreciation row has no visible values and no clear linkage to the selected COGS bucket. It should not be added.
Generic amortization row has no visible values and no clear linkage to the selected COGS bucket. It should not be added.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket already uses the explicit total row 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS amortization row is a nested component of that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in  Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Appears directly beneath 'Administrative expenses' with an accompanying balancing row, so it looks like a component embedded within the selected administrative expense total rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling expenses
candidates.why: Appears directly beneath 'Selling expenses' with an accompanying balancing row, so it looks like a component embedded within the selected selling expense total rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Appears directly beneath 'Research and development expenses' with a balancing row, indicating it is embedded in the selected R&D total. Also the same R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so this R&D D&A should not be added separately.
Generic D&A label appears later but has no visible values and no clear assignment to the selected SG&A component rows. It should not be added.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Generic amortization row has no visible values and no clear mapping to the selected SG&A components. It should not be added.
Generic depreciation row has no visible values and no clear mapping to the selected SG&A components. It should not be added.
Generic amortization row has no visible values and no clear mapping to the selected SG&A components. It should not be added.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is built from explicit component totals: Administrative expenses, Selling expenses, and Research and development expenses. The visible D&A rows sit beneath those totals as sub-components with balancing rows, so they are already embedded. Adding them separately would double count. The R&D amortization row is additionally excluded by the XSGA/XRD interaction rule because 'Research and development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
